jstats 0.9.81
  • Reference

Internal: detect SPSS-form UDM-bearing columns in a data frame

dot-jst_has_spss_udm.Rd

Returns the names of variables whose UDM representation is SPSS-form, i.e. the column carries na_values and/or na_range attributes (as produced by haven::labelled_spss()). Used by jsave's pre-flight check before writing to .dta (which has no SPSS-UDM representation; Stata uses tagged NAs instead).

Usage

.jst_has_spss_udm(data)

Details

Walks the columns of data via .jst_missing_info() for a single source of truth on UDM representation detection. Returns names where representation == "spss".

On this page
